# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Deployment that pulls our application image from Docker Hub. Use the latest tag so we always get the newest version automatically. This is for our development environment where we want continuous updates without manual intervention.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: myapp-deployment-dev
  labels:
    app: myapp
    env: dev
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: myapp
      env: dev
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: myapp
        env: dev
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: myapp-container
        image: your-dockerhub-username/your-app-image:latest
        imagePullPolicy: Always
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: "100m"
            memory: "128Mi"
          requests:
            cpu: "50m"
            memory: "64Mi"
